revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Pittsburgh Panthers | Guid=3015-13193 | Deck=The Panhthers are the University of Pittsburgh's athletics teams. | Characters=Characters/Dan_Marino | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/NCAA_Basketball_10,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Pennsylvania,Locations/Pittsburgh,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3604922-4464831686-i.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3604922-4464831686-i.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_tiny,scale_small,scale_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Panhthers are the University of Pittsburgh's athletics teams.

{{Concept | Name=Plasma Droid | Guid=3015-13640 | Deck=The plasma battle droid was a gargantuan, 12-foot version of the standard B1-series battle droid used by the Trade Federation. They fired lightning-like plasma blasts that were powerful enough to overwhelm even a Jedi lightsaber. They were designed to disrupt enemy infrastructure, and as a result were poorly-defended. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Battle_Droids,Concepts/Droids,Concepts/Trade_Federation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Star_Wars_Episode_I_Jedi_Power_Battles | Locations=Locations/Naboo,Locations/Theed | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Plasma battle droids appear in the 2000 video game ''Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles''. Their appearance in a mission contradicts ''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace''. In the game, the Jedi face two plasma battle droids, whereas in the film they face a contingent of battle droids.

{{Concept | Name=Player 2 Character | Guid=3015-13243 | Deck=In games where the characters are locked to the player's order number, this character is always the second player's character in at least one game. | Characters=Characters/Agent_G,Characters/Amy_Rose,Characters/Aran_Ryan,Characters/Bald_Bull,Characters/Bandana_Waddle_Dee,Characters/Bass,Characters/Bear_Hugger,Characters/Bob,Characters/Bob_Charlie,Characters/Dragon_Chan,Characters/E_123_Omega,Characters/Espio_the_Chameleon,Characters/Gabby_Jay,Characters/Gunstar_Blue,Characters/Hoy_Quarlow,Characters/Jake_55679,Characters/Jimmy_Lee,Characters/Keeby,Characters/Keike_Kagero,Characters/Ken_Masters,Characters/Kevin_Walker,Characters/Knuckles,Characters/Lance_Bean,Characters/Lepus,Characters/Little_Mac,Characters/Luigi,Characters/Mad_Clown,Characters/Maria_Robotnik,Characters/Masked_Muscle,Characters/Mobo,Characters/Mr_Sandman,Characters/Mugman,Characters/Narcis_Prince,Characters/Nick_Bruiser,Characters/P_Body,Characters/Piston_Hurricane,Characters/RC011,Characters/Rick_Bruiser,Characters/Rouge_The_Bat,Characters/Rubby,Characters/Sonic_the_Hedgehog,Characters/Super_Macho_Man,Characters/Tails,Characters/Tarma_Roving,Characters/Tiat,Characters/Tiat_Young,Characters/TonTon,Characters/Two_P,Characters/Upa_Upa,Characters/Vector_the_Crocodile,Characters/Zowie_Scott | Concepts=Concepts/Palette_Swap,Concepts/Player_Character,Concepts/Twins | Franchises= | Games=Games/Bonanza_Bros,Games/Bubble_Bobble,Games/Bubble_Bobble_Part_2,Games/Castle_of_Dragon,Games/Contra,Games/Contra_III_The_Alien_Wars,Games/Cuphead,Games/Double_Dragon,Games/Double_Dragon_1987,Games/Double_Dragon_II_The_Revenge,Games/Double_Dragon_III_The_Sacred_Stones,Games/Double_Dragon_Neon,Games/Double_Dragon_Trilogy,Games/Forgotten_Worlds,Games/Gang_Busters,Games/Gradius_Origins,Games/Gunstar_Heroes,Games/Justice_Ninja_Casey,Games/Kirbys_Dream_Course,Games/Legendary_Wings,Games/Life_Force,Games/Little_Ninja_Brothers,Games/Mario_Bros,Games/Mega_Man_7,Games/Metal_Slug_Super_Vehicle_001,Games/Portal_2,Games/Punch_Out,Games/Puzzle_And_Action_Ichidant_R,Games/Puzzle_And_Action_Tant_R,Games/Puzzle_And_Action_Treasure_Hunt,Games/Rabbit_Punch,Games/Rainbow_Islands,Games/Resistance_3,Games/Sagaia,Games/Salamander_Deluxe_Pack_Plus,Games/Salamander_Portable,Games/SEGA_AGES_2500_Vol_25_Gunstar_Heroes_Treasure_Box,Games/SEGA_AGES_2500_Vol_6_Puzzle_And_Action_Bonanza_Bros,Games/Sega_Ages_Puzzle_And_Action_Shukudai_ga_Tant_R,Games/Sega_Classics_Collection,Games/Shadow_the_Hedgehog,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_2,Games/Street_Fighter,Games/Super_Mario_All_Stars,Games/Super_Mario_All_Stars_And_Super_Mario_World,Games/Super_Mario_Bros,Games/Super_Mario_Bros_3,Games/Super_Mario_World,Games/Super_Punch_Out,Games/The_Lara_Croft_Collection,Games/Wrecking_Crew | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Lord_British,Objects/Raiden_mk_IIb,Objects/Thrasher | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3605010-2371575479-800px.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3605010-2371575479-800px.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_mini,scale_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> In games where the characters are locked to the player's order number, this character is always the second player's character in at least one game.

{{Concept | Name=Playtime Co | Guid=3015-13413 | Deck=The toy company form the Playtime saga. Respoinble for the creations of many toys. | Characters=Characters/Doey_The_Doughman,Characters/Eddie_M_N_Ritterman,Characters/Elliot_Ludwig,Characters/Harley_Sawyer,Characters/Huggy_Wuggy,Characters/Leith_Pierre,Characters/Poppy_Playtime,Characters/Stella_Greyber,Characters/The_Intruder | Concepts=Concepts/Resource_Extraction_Specialists | Franchises=Franchises/Playtime | Games=Games/Dark_Deception_Monsters_And_Mortals,Games/Poppy_Playtime,Games/Poppy_Playtime_Chapter_2,Games/Poppy_Playtime_Chapter_3,Games/Poppy_Playtime_Chapter_4,Games/Poppy_Playtime_Triple_Pack,Games/Project_Playtime | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The toy company form the Playtime saga. Respoinble for the creations of many toys.

{{Concept | Name=Plesiosaurus | Guid=3015-13357 | Deck=An extinct species of marine reptile with a long neck. | Characters=Characters/Loch_Ness_Monster | Concepts=Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/Ape_Escape,Games/Banjo_Tooie,Games/Dead_or_Alive_4,Games/Dino_Crisis_2,Games/Dyna_Brothers,Games/Dyna_Brothers_2,Games/Omori,Games/Turok_3_Shadow_of_Oblivion,Games/Turok_Evolution | Locations=Locations/The_Ancient_World | Objects=Objects/Water | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3660031-dinocrisis21.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3660031-dinocrisis21.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,screen_kubrick,screen_medium,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An extinct species of marine reptile with a long neck.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Pressing the Switch Remotely | Guid=3015-13448 | Deck=If the game allows, intended or optional, to influence the buttons and levers, not only by pressing them in close proximity with your hand/sword, but also by firing weapons at them, controlling them with magic or throwing objects at them from afar | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Item_Throw,Concepts/Telekinesis,Concepts/Trap | Franchises= | Games=Games/Alundra,Games/Ape_Escape,Games/Blade_of_Darkness,Games/Chasm_The_Rift,Games/Condemned_2_Bloodshot,Games/Conkers_Bad_Fur_Day,Games/Dark_Savior,Games/Darksiders_Genesis,Games/Darksiders_II,Games/Descent_II,Games/Forsaken,Games/James_Bond_Casino_Royale,Games/Lara_Croft_and_the_Guardian_of_Light,Games/Legend_of_Grimrock,Games/Legend_of_Grimrock_2,Games/The_Chronicles_of_Riddick_Assault_on_Dark_Athena,Games/The_Lara_Croft_Collection,Games/The_Legend_of_Zelda_Majoras_Mask,Games/The_Lost_Vikings,Games/Turok_2_Seeds_of_Evil,Games/Wild_Arms_2,Games/Wild_Arms_Alter_Code_F | Locations=Locations/Dungeon | Objects=Objects/Blocks,Objects/Boomerang,Objects/Button,Objects/Gun,Objects/Pressure_Plate,Objects/Spikes,Objects/Switch,Objects/Whip | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3718109-darksavior%2820%29.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3718109-darksavior(20).jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":"Dark Savior"},"background":[]}' /> One of the interesting representatives of [[Concepts/Search_Action|action-puzzling]] and [[Concepts/Immersive_Sim|immersive sim]]. For example, we telekinesis lift a stone and lower it on a lever in the distance, so that falling, he fell, he pressed his weight on the handle and we lowered the bridge. Or provoke a chain of events, like [[Concepts/Rube_Goldberg_Puzzler|Rube Goldberg Puzzler]], at the end of which something presses a button on the wall or on the [[Objects/Pressure_Plate|floor plate]] for us. Or just shoot at such objects with a bow/firearm, throw dynamite, throw a boomerang, hook and pull with a whip, for which the player can specially allocate [[Concepts/Infinite_Ammo|infinite ammunition]] for weak weapons.

{{Concept | Name=Preta | Guid=3015-13610 | Characters=Characters/Kusaregedo,Characters/Preta | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Home_Sweet_Home_2018,Games/Samurai_Shodown_Anthology,Games/Samurai_Shodown_NeoGeo_Collection,Games/Samurai_Shodown_V,Games/Samurai_Shodown_V_Perfect,Games/Samurai_Shodown_V_Special,Games/Samurai_Shodown_VI | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Principal | Guid=3015-13450 | Characters=Characters/Kamine_Botan,Characters/Principal,Characters/Principal_of_the_Thing,Characters/Raizo_Imawano | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Baldis_Basics_in_Education_and_Learning,Games/Battle_Girl_High_School,Games/Battle_High_2,Games/Ranma_1_2_Akanekodan_teki_Hihou,Games/Ranma_1_2_Battle_Renaissance,Games/Ranma_1_2_Hard_Battle,Games/Rival_Schools_United_by_Fate,Games/Street_Combat | Locations=Locations/San_Bruno_High_School,Locations/School | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Psion | Guid=3015-13319 | Deck=Psions are a species of psychically-empowered beings who were conquered and enslaved by the Cabal in the hopes of weaponizing their abilities. They now primarily serve as engineers, pilots and fire support within the Cabal Legions. Those within the Calus' Shadow Legion would later be reshaped by The Witness into Attendants and Weavers in it's Dread forces. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Alien,Concepts/Cabal_9935,Concepts/Enslaved_Race,Concepts/Psionics,Concepts/Psychic_Ability,Concepts/Red_Legion,Concepts/Shadow_Legion,Concepts/The_Dread | Franchises= | Games=Games/Destiny_2,Games/Destiny_2014 | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Europe,Locations/Io,Locations/Mars,Locations/Mercury,Locations/Neomuna,Locations/Neptune,Locations/Nessus,Locations/The_Pale_Heart | Objects=Objects/Cape,Objects/Helmet,Objects/Sniper_Rifle | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3644681-9256248075-Psion.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3644681-9256248075-Psion.png","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Psions are a species of psychically-empowered beings who were conquered and enslaved by the Cabal in the hopes of weaponizing their abilities. They now primarily serve as engineers, pilots and fire support within the Cabal Legions. Those within the Calus' Shadow Legion would later be reshaped by The Witness into Attendants and Weavers in it's Dread forces.

{{Concept | Name=Purdue Boilermakers | Guid=3015-13194 | Deck=The Boilermakers are Purdue University's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/NCAA_Basketball_10,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Indiana,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/West_Lafayette | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3604923-8860325287-purdu.png}}

{{Concept |Guid=3015-13283 |Name=Red Arremer |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/16/164924/3628363-4101194456-latest.png |Deck=A tribe of demonic creatures in the Ghosts 'n Goblins series and other Capcom titles. |Characters=Characters/Devil_56690, Characters/Firebrand |Concepts=Concepts/Arremer_King, Concepts/Demon, Concepts/Flight, Concepts/Flying_Enemies, Concepts/Mini_Boss, Concepts/Recurring_Minion |Locations=Locations/Castle, Locations/Cave, Locations/Hell |Games=Games/Arthur_to_Astaroth_no_Nazo_Makimura_Incredible_Toons, Games/Black_Tiger, Games/Capcom_Arcade_2nd_Stadium, Games/Capcom_Arcade_Cabinet, Games/Capcom_Arcade_Stadium, Games/Capcom_Classics_Collection, Games/Capcom_Classics_Collection_Reloaded, Games/Capcom_Classics_Collection_Volume_2, Games/Capcom_Generations, Games/Capcom_Generations_2_Chronicles_of_Arthur, Games/Demons_Crest, Games/Gargoyles_Quest, Games/Gargoyles_Quest_II_The_Demon_Darkness, Games/Ghosts_N_Goblins, Games/Ghosts_n_Goblins_Gold_Knights, Games/Ghosts_N_Goblins_Gold_Knights_II, Games/Ghosts_n_Goblins_Resurrection, Games/Ghouls_N_Ghosts, Games/Goku_Makaimura_Kai, Games/Higemaru_Makaijima, Games/Makaimura_for_WonderSwan, Games/Makaimura_Online, Games/Namco_x_Capcom, Games/Street_Fighter_X_All_Capcom, Games/Super_Ghouls_N_Ghosts, Games/SVC_Chaos_SNK_vs_Capcom, Games/The_Capcom_Collection, Games/Ultimate_Ghosts_N_Goblins, Games/Ultimate_Marvel_vs_Capcom_3 }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3628363-4101194456-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A tribe of demonic creatures in the Ghosts 'n Goblins series and other Capcom titles.

{{Concept | Name=Red Legion | Guid=3015-13318 | Deck=The Red Legion is an elite Cabal Legion once led by Dominus Ghaul. They invaded Earth seeking to claim the Traveler as their own in a conflict called the "Red War". In the aftermath of the Red War, the Legion would fracture into splinter groups under various leaders such as Val Ca'uor, Valus Thuun and The Psion Flayer Council. Most of the remnants of the Red Legion now serve under Empress Caiatl, Ghaul's Daughter, And are now allied with Humanity and the Eliksni "House of Light" in The Coalition. | Characters=Characters/Dominus_Ghaul,Characters/Val_Cauor | Concepts=Concepts/Alien,Concepts/Alien_Invasion,Concepts/Cabal_9935,Concepts/Fleet,Concepts/Mining,Concepts/Psion,Concepts/Shielded_Enemies,Concepts/Soldier,Concepts/Super_Weapon,Concepts/Useable_Vehicles,Concepts/Weak_Spot | Franchises=Franchises/Destiny | Games=Games/Destiny_2 | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Europe,Locations/Io,Locations/Mars,Locations/Mercury,Locations/Nessus,Locations/Sun | Objects=Objects/Airborne_Hovercraft,Objects/Armor,Objects/Drop_Pod,Objects/Dropship,Objects/Flamethrower,Objects/Goliath_6991,Objects/Grenade,Objects/Gunship,Objects/Helmet,Objects/Interceptor,Objects/Shield,Objects/Shotgun,Objects/Space_Station,Objects/Spaceship,Objects/Tank,Objects/The_Almighty,Objects/Thresher,Objects/Turret | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3644661-0713462611-RedLe.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3644661-0713462611-RedLe.png","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Red Legion is an elite Cabal Legion once led by Dominus Ghaul. They invaded Earth seeking to claim the Traveler as their own in a conflict called the "Red War". In the aftermath of the Red War, the Legion would fracture into splinter groups under various leaders such as Val Ca'uor, Valus Thuun and The Psion Flayer Council. Most of the remnants of the Red Legion now serve under Empress Caiatl, Ghaul's Daughter, And are now allied with Humanity and the Eliksni "House of Light" in The Coalition.

{{Concept | Name=Reek | Guid=3015-13644 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_III_The_Clone_Wars | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Rellor | Guid=3015-13531 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777841-0953rellor.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3777841-0953rellor.png","path":"13\/135472\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

page.title: Concepts/Removed from the Epic Games Store

revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Removed from the Epic Games Store | Guid=3015-13494 | Deck=Games once available on Epic's storefront, but which have been removed from sale for any number of reason. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Delisted_Games,Concepts/Epic_Games_Store,Concepts/Removed_from_gog_com,Concepts/Removed_from_Steam | Franchises= | Games=Games/Beyond_Good_And_Evil,Games/Cave_Storys_Secret_Santa,Games/Concord,Games/Crayta,Games/Death_Stranding,Games/Doom,Games/Doom_II_Hell_on_Earth,Games/Evil_Dead_The_Game_2022,Games/Fuser,Games/Gran_Saga,Games/Heroes_And_Generals,Games/Hitman,Games/Hyper_Scape,Games/JYDGE,Games/Knockout_City,Games/Magic_Legends,Games/Maritime_Calling,Games/Monopoly_Plus,Games/MultiVersus,Games/Observer,Games/Rumbleverse,Games/Rune_II_Decapitation_Edition,Games/Scavengers,Games/Second_Extinction,Games/Space_Punks,Games/Spellbreak,Games/Stranger_Things_3_The_Game,Games/The_Crew,Games/The_Cycle_Frontier,Games/The_Outbound_Ghost,Games/Ticket_to_Ride,Games/Video_Horror_Society,Games/Warshmallows,Games/XDefiant,Games/Zorya_The_Celestial_Sisters | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Games once available on Epic's storefront, but which have been removed from sale for any number of reason.

{{Concept | Name=Renault | Guid=3015-13328 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Formula_One_2002,Games/Grand_Prix_Challenge,Games/Project_CARS_3,Games/TOCA_Race_Driver_3 | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Renault_Espace_F1 | People= }}

{{Concept | Name=Republic of Korea Army | Guid=3015-13402 | Deck=The Republic of Korea Army, also known as South Korean Army, is the ground-based warfare component of South Korea's armed forces. | Characters=Characters/Baek_Doo_San,Characters/Hwoarang | Concepts=Concepts/Korean_Peoples_Army,Concepts/United_States_Army | Franchises= | Games=Games/Battlefield_2042,Games/Call_of_Duty_Advanced_Warfare,Games/Mercenaries_Playground_of_Destruction,Games/Splinter_Cell_Trilogy,Games/Tekken_4,Games/Tekken_5,Games/Tom_Clancys_Splinter_Cell_Chaos_Theory | Locations=Locations/Korea,Locations/Military_Base,Locations/North_Korea,Locations/Seoul,Locations/South_Korea | Objects=Objects/Gun | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3693967-coat_of_arms_of_the_republic_of_korea_army.svg.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3693967-coat_of_arms_of_the_republic_of_korea_army.svg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Republic of Korea Army, also known as South Korean Army, is the ground-based warfare component of South Korea's armed forces.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Rice Owls | Guid=3015-13195 | Deck=The Owls are Rice University's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/MVP_06_NCAA_Baseball,Games/MVP_07_NCAA_Baseball,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Houston,Locations/Texas,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3608564-1113391620-AIdro_nOhZNNXqrp0uRnKlERA_yXF9OZN-wy-SSVQ8fQgS53oQ%3Ds900-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3608564-1113391620-AIdro_nOhZNNXqrp0uRnKlERA_yXF9OZN-wy-SSVQ8fQgS53oQ=s900-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_medium,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_avatar,scale_small,screen_kubrick,square_tiny,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Owls are Rice University's athletics teams.

page.title: Concepts/Riding in a Horse Drawn Carriage

revision.text: {{Concept |Guid=3015-13451 |Name=Riding in a Horse-Drawn Carriage |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/173/1734046/3719535-8838286575-16124.png |Deck=Riding a Cart or Stage Coach pulled by horses or fantasy animals |Characters=Characters/Asterix, Characters/Aya_Brea, Characters/Morgan_Adams, Characters/Richter_Belmont, Characters/The_Prince_2623 |Concepts=Concepts/Horse_Riding, Concepts/Horses, Concepts/Postal_Service |Locations=Locations/Wild_West |Games=Games/Asterix_and_the_Power_of_the_Gods, Games/Call_of_Juarez_Bound_in_Blood, Games/Castlevania_Requiem_Symphony_of_the_Night_And_Rondo_of_Blood, Games/Castlevania_Rondo_of_Blood, Games/Cutthroat_Island, Games/Galahad, Games/Golden_Axe_III, Games/Parasite_Eve, Games/Prince_of_Persia_The_Two_Thrones, Games/Shadow_of_Rome, Games/The_Elder_Scrolls_V_Skyrim |Objects=Objects/Cart, Objects/Covered_Wagon, Objects/Stage_Coach }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3719535-8838286575-16124.png","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":"Cutthroat Island"},"background":[]}' /> Similar to riding a horse itself, but when we are on the wagon it is pulling, like on a platform, because we cannot control the animal and only have to fend off attacks from enemies and wait for them to run out or be allowed to jump to another wagon. A popular type of level and situations in action games, especially in the western setting.

{{Concept | Name=Roaring Moon | Guid=3015-13577 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777902-1280px-1005roaring_moon.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3777902-1280px-1005roaring_moon.png","path":"13\/135472\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_mini,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Romani | Guid=3015-13638 | Characters=Characters/Vulko_58751 | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Rorschach Test | Guid=3015-13453 | Deck=A diagnostic test from Hermann Rorschach, a Swiss psychiatrist from the early 20th century. In the 21st century, the spot patterns used in it have gone beyond psychiatric hospitals, becoming part of pop culture | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Psychotherapy | Franchises= | Games= | Locations=Locations/Psychiatric_Institution | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3721701-rorschach_blot_01.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3721701-rorschach_blot_01.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,scale_super,scale_tiny,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,screen_medium,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> This is where games go if the test itself is being performed on someone in the game. If the game simply contains such images, they are entered into [https://www.giantbomb.com/rorschach-inkblot/3055-7684 Objects].

{{Concept | Name=Royal Air Force | Guid=3015-13383 | Deck=The Royal Air Force is the air and space component of the United Kingdom's military. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/United_States_Air_Force | Franchises= | Games=Games/Battlefield_1942,Games/Battlefield_2,Games/Battlefield_V,Games/Call_of_Duty_3,Games/Call_of_Duty_United_Offensive,Games/Call_of_Duty_WWII | Locations=Locations/England,Locations/Europe,Locations/Germany,Locations/Ireland,Locations/Scotland,Locations/United_Kingdom,Locations/Wales | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3677660-raf-badge.svg.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3677660-raf-badge.svg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_medium,square_medium,scale_large,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Royal Air Force is the air and space component of the United Kingdom's military.

{{Concept | Name=Russian Blue | Guid=3015-13305 | Deck=A Russian breed of cat. | Characters=Characters/Dex_Starr | Concepts=Concepts/Cats | Franchises= | Games=Games/Injustice_2,Games/Kawaii_Koneko_3D,Games/Kawaii_Koneko_DS,Games/Kawaii_Koneko_DS_2,Games/Kawaii_Koneko_DS_3,Games/Kotoba_no_Puzzle_Mojipittan_DS,Games/LEGO_Batman_3_Beyond_Gotham,Games/LEGO_DC_Super_Villains,Games/Petz_Catz_Clan,Games/Scribblenauts_Mega_Pack,Games/Scribblenauts_Unmasked_A_DC_Comics_Adventure | Locations=Locations/Russia | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3637267-4268777170-Russi.jpg}}

{{Concept | Name=Sandmaargh | Guid=3015-13652 | Deck=Sandmaarghs are enemies in Super Mario 3D Land. They are variants of Magmaarghs that live in sand instead of lava. They are somewhat dinosaur-like, with red spines going down their back. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Non_Player_Character | Franchises= | Games=Games/Mario_And_Luigi_Paper_Jam,Games/Mario_Golf_Super_Rush,Games/Super_Mario_3D_Land | Locations=Locations/Desert | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Sandmaarghs are enemies in Super Mario 3D Land. They are variants of Magmaarghs that live in sand instead of lava. They are somewhat dinosaur-like, with red spines going down their back.

{{Concept | Name=Sandy Shocks | Guid=3015-13561 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777875-0989sandy_shocks.png}}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Sarlacc | Guid=3015-13639 | Deck=Sarlaccs were dangerous, carnivorous creatures located on Tatooine and several other planets throughout the galaxy. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Alien,Concepts/Boss_Fight | Franchises= | Games=Games/Disney_Infinity_3_0_Edition,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_II_The_Original_Trilogy,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Complete_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Skywalker_Saga,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_15481,Games/Star_Wars_Bounty_Hunter,Games/Star_Wars_Demolition,Games/Star_Wars_Empire_at_War,Games/Star_Wars_Episode_I_Jedi_Power_Battles,Games/Star_Wars_Rogue_Squadron_III_Rebel_Strike,Games/Star_Wars_Shadows_of_the_Empire,Games/Star_Wars_The_Force_Unleashed,Games/Star_Wars_The_Old_Republic,Games/Super_Star_Wars | Locations=Locations/Tatooine | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3819132-6861061874-latest.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3819132-6861061874-latest.png","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Sarlaccs were dangerous, carnivorous creatures located on Tatooine and several other planets throughout the galaxy.

{{Concept | Name=Saxons | Guid=3015-13255 | Characters=Characters/Geoffrey_Longsword,Characters/Wilfred_of_Ivanhoe | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Total_War_Saga_Thrones_of_Britannia | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Scissor Kick | Guid=3015-13324 | Deck=Powerful kick, when jumping on the first leg, we begin to throw forward the second, but bend it at the knee and withdraw it, and then the first, having received from these alternations of legs the necessary charge of inertia, strike in the air | Characters=Characters/Booker_T,Characters/M_Bison,Characters/Sketch_Turner | Concepts=Concepts/Axe_Kick,Concepts/Bicycle_Kick,Concepts/Front_Kick,Concepts/Jump_Kick,Concepts/Kickboxing,Concepts/Martial_Arts,Concepts/Melee,Concepts/Roundhouse_Kick,Concepts/Soccer_Player,Concepts/Split_Kick,Concepts/Sweep_Kick | Franchises= | Games=Games/Comix_Zone,Games/Dead_or_Alive_2_Hardcore,Games/Dead_or_Alive_3,Games/Dragon_The_Bruce_Lee_Story,Games/Hyper_Street_Fighter_II_The_Anniversary_Edition,Games/Injustice_2,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us,Games/Mortal_Kombat_11,Games/Mortal_Kombat_2011,Games/Mortal_Kombat_vs_DC_Universe,Games/Mortal_Kombat_X,Games/Street_Fighter_30th_Anniversary_Collection,Games/Street_Fighter_6,Games/Street_Fighter_Alpha_2,Games/Street_Fighter_Collection_2,Games/Street_Fighter_II_Champion_Edition,Games/Street_Fighter_V,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II_Turbo_HD_Remix,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II_Turbo_Revival,Games/The_Wild_Rings,Games/TNA_iMPACT,Games/TNA_iMPACT_Cross_the_Line,Games/TNA_Wrestling,Games/Ultra_Street_Fighter_II_The_Final_Challengers,Games/Ultra_Street_Fighter_IV,Games/WCW_Backstage_Assault,Games/WCW_Mayhem,Games/WCW_Nitro,Games/WCW_nWo_Revenge,Games/WCW_nWo_Thunder,Games/WWE_12,Games/WWE_13,Games/WWE_2K_Battlegrounds,Games/WWE_2K15,Games/WWE_2K16,Games/WWE_2K17,Games/WWE_2K18,Games/WWE_2K19,Games/WWE_2K20,Games/WWE_2K22,Games/WWE_Aftershock,Games/WWE_Champions,Games/WWE_Crush_Hour,Games/WWE_Day_of_Reckoning,Games/WWE_Day_of_Reckoning_2,Games/WWE_Mayhem,Games/WWE_Raw_2,Games/WWE_Road_to_WrestleMania_X8,Games/WWE_SmackDown_Here_Comes_the_Pain,Games/WWE_SmackDown_Shut_Your_Mouth,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2006,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2007,Games/WWE_SmackDown_vs_RAW_2008,Games/WWE_SuperCard,Games/WWE_Survivor_Series,Games/WWE_WrestleMania_X8,Games/WWE_WrestleMania_XIX | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/Sports_Stadium,Locations/Stadium | Objects=Objects/Ball,Objects/Beach_Ball,Objects/Soccer_Ball | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3645534-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B0_11-03-2024_08.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3645534-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0430_11-03-2024_08.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Comix Zone"},"background":[]}' /> This technique is also used in sports where you have to kick the ball with your foot: soccer, beach soccer, etc., but do it in a fall.

{{Concept | Name=Scovillain | Guid=3015-13530 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/13/135472/3777840-0952scovillain.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3777840-0952scovillain.png","path":"13\/135472\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Seadramon | Guid=3015-13395 | Deck=Seadramon is a Champion level sea dragon Digimon. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Betamon,Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/Dragon,Concepts/Neptunemon,Concepts/Otamamon,Concepts/Water_Manipulation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Battle,Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Links,Games/Digimon_Masters,Games/Digimon_ReArise,Games/Digimon_Soul_Chaser,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Complete_Edition,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Hackers_Memory,Games/Digimon_Story_Lost_Evolution,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger,Games/Digimon_Super_Rumble,Games/Digimon_World,Games/Digimon_World_2,Games/Digimon_World_3,Games/Digimon_World_Championship,Games/Digimon_World_DS,Games/Digimon_World_Dusk_Dawn,Games/Digimon_World_Next_Order,Games/Digimon_World_Re_Digitize,Games/Digimon_World_Re_Digitize_Decode | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3693988-0756222434-latest.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Shin Bet | Guid=3015-13303 | Deck=Shin Bet, also known as Israel Security Agency, is one of the three organizations of the Israeli Intelligence Community. | Characters=Characters/Dahlia_Tal | Concepts=Concepts/Counter_Terrorist,Concepts/Judaism,Concepts/Racism,Concepts/Terrorist,Concepts/Torture | Franchises= | Games=Games/Splinter_Cell_Trilogy,Games/Tom_Clancys_Splinter_Cell_Pandora_Tomorrow | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Earth,Locations/Israel | Objects=Objects/Gun | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3636350-israel_security_agency.svg.png}}
